source: 2024 Guidelines for Admission for Holders of National Senior Certificate

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery
notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
For Health Sciences, FPS is calculated out of 900 by adding APS and NBT scores.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
NBT requirements are placed in notes, not in curriculum subject requirements.
For some Health Sciences programmes, Band C applies to South African applicants in redress categories 1 and 2, with possible consideration for redress categories 3 and 4 if targets are not met.
Eligible applicant group: Only South African applicants in redress categories 1 and 2.
Admission band used: Band C.
Admission outcome: Possible admission.
Score requirement: 644 FPS or above.
Notes: NBT scores of Intermediate for AL, QL and Mathematics are required for possible admission.; Probable admission: 807 WPS or above.; Guaranteed admission: 810 FPS or above..
Additional subject or selection requirements: Next_3_best_subjects_excluding_Life_Orientation: 70% or above.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Science in Occupational Therapy
notes: Main requirement uses the lowest listed possible-admission band where available.
For Health Sciences, FPS is calculated out of 900 by adding APS and NBT scores.
WPS is the Weighted Points Score and applies to South African applicants only.
NBT requirements are placed in notes, not in curriculum subject requirements.
For some Health Sciences programmes, Band C applies to South African applicants in redress categories 1 and 2, with possible consideration for redress categories 3 and 4 if targets are not met.
Eligible applicant group: South African applicants in redress categories 1 and 2; redress categories 3 and 4 may be considered if faculty targets are not met.
Admission band used: Band C.
Admission outcome: Possible admission.
Score requirement: 565 FPS for redress 1; 580 FPS for redress 2; 670 FPS for redress 3 and 4.
Minimum scores by redress category: redress_1: 565; redress_2: 580; redress_3_and_4: 670.

Notes: NBT scores of Intermediate for AL, QL and Mathematics are required; applicants taking Mathematical Literacy are exempted from the NBT Mathematics Test.; A Mathematics NBT equivalence score is calculated for Mathematical Literacy applicants using: NBT Quantitative Literacy score minus 20 points = NBT Mathematics result.; Probable admission: 782 WPS or above.; Guaranteed admission: 730 FPS or above..
Additional subject or selection requirements: Next_3_best_subjects_excluding_Life_Orientation: 60% or above.
